student_commuter.name: Student Commuter
student_commuter.description: Bike/bus/metro traveler, low budget, limited energy consumption, high potential for simple long-term habit formation.

working_professional.name: Working Professional
working_professional.description: Daily single-driver driver, high energy and frequent AC usage, frequent online shopper, gets regular food deliveries.

reductive_actions.title: Reduce AC usage by 1 hour/day
reductive_actions.description: Small adjustment to your thermostat or reducing AC time. Also saves on your electric bill!
reductive_actions.tip: Set a shutdown timer. Try using natural ventilation during cooler evening hours.

reductive_actions.title: Switch to public transit twice a week
reductive_actions.description: Swap the car for the bus or metro on two days of your weekly commute.
reductive_actions.tip: Use your transit commute time to read, study, or catch up on emails safely.

reductive_actions.title: Reduce food waste & compost
reductive_actions.description: Saves purchase costs and prevents methane emissions in landfills.
reductive_actions.tip: Plan meals on Sunday, buy only what you need, and freeze leftovers promptly.

reductive_actions.title: Walk or bike for trips under 2 miles
reductive_actions.description: Leave the car home for neighborhood errands. Great for your physical fitness!
reductive_actions.tip: Keep a durable backpack handy for quick walking trips to the grocer.

reductive_actions.title: Unplug standby electronics
reductive_actions.description: Turn off power strips and standbys for electronics not active (TVs, chargers).
reductive_actions.tip: Use a smart power strip that cuts current automatically when devices are idle.

reductive_actions.title: Line-dry laundry default
reductive_actions.description: Avoid using the tumble dryer. Naturally dried clothes last longer.
reductive_actions.tip: Set up an indoor rack in well-ventilated rooms if outdoor space is restricted.

reductive_actions.title: Swap 2 beef meals/week for plant-based
reductive_actions.description: Beef has significant land use and methane emissions. Swapping twice a week works wonders.
reductive_actions.tip: Experiment with rich lentils, black beans, or chickpeas seasoned with your favorite spices.

reductive_actions.title: Combine online shopping orders
reductive_actions.description: Consolidate your orders to receive a single package instead of individual daily drops.
reductive_actions.tip: Keep items in your cart until your designated weekly shopping consolidation day.

weekly_challenges.title: Bike, Walk, or Roll
weekly_challenges.action: Walk or bike for short trips today instead of riding. If commuting far, try the bus or train.

weekly_challenges.title: Eco-Temperature Day
weekly_challenges.action: Reduce AC or space heater operation by at least 1-2 hours today.

weekly_challenges.title: Zero Delivery Zero Waste
weekly_challenges.action: Pass on online shopping deliveries or meal takeouts today. Eat home-cooked meals.

weekly_challenges.title: Vampire Power Sweep
weekly_challenges.action: Locate and unplug 5 standby power bricks or turn off unused power strips before sleep.

weekly_challenges.title: Green Plate Focus
weekly_challenges.action: Enjoy fully plant-based dishes today for lunch and dinner (no meat/dairy where possible).

weekly_challenges.title: Dry Naturally
weekly_challenges.action: Wash laundry today but dry it naturally on a rack, skip the energy-hungry clothes dryer.

weekly_challenges.title: Energy Audit & Share
weekly_challenges.action: Inspect your light bulbs for LED upgrades and review your CarbonCoach AI final roadmap.
